spec: shows just a score starting at 0, a button labeled "+2" that adds 2, and a button labeled "+3" that adds 3
shows just a floor number starting at 1, a button labeled "up" that adds 1, and a button labeled "down" that subtracts 1 but never goes below 1
has buttons labeled "like" and "dislike", showing "Likes: <n>" and "Dislikes: <m>" tallies starting at 0
has buttons labeled "dark" and "light"; the text "DARK MODE" is shown only after "dark" and until "light"
shows just a number starting at 64, and a button labeled "half" that halves it
shows just a number starting at 0, a button labeled "+25" that adds 25, and the text "complete" once the number is 100 or more
has a text input and shows "NAME: <typed text>"
has a button labeled "switch" that toggles the shown text between "mode A" (the start) and "mode B"
shows just a number starting at 0, and a button labeled "+4" that adds 4 only while the number is less than 10
has buttons labeled "a+", "b+", and "c+", each adding 1 to its own hidden count, and shows just the SUM of the three counts (starting 0)
has a text input; shows the text "type something" until something is typed
shows just a number starting at 0, and a button labeled "step" that replaces it with twice itself plus one
shows "<t>°" starting at "20°", a button labeled "warmer" that adds 1 degree, and a button labeled "cooler" that subtracts 1
has a button labeled "add apple" showing "Apples: <n>" and a button labeled "add pear" showing "Pears: <m>", tallies starting at 0
has a button labeled "unlock"; after it is clicked 3 times the text "OPEN" appears (hidden before that)
has a text input whose text is shown in a label, and a button labeled "clear" that empties it
